segments.scene_description: In an underground concrete walkway illuminated by green neon lights, a character in futuristic pink and black attire sits against a concrete bench interacting with a handheld device. An NPC pedestrian walks past from left to right heading toward the stairs in the background, while the seated character occasionally looks up from their device to observe the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static yet living moment within a cyberpunk underground walkway defined by cold concrete and vibrant neon accents. It begins with a focus on a character in futuristic pink and black attire sitting against a concrete bench, absorbed in a handheld device. As the scene unfolds, the oppressive stillness is broken by an NPC pedestrian who walks past from left to right, moving toward a set of stairs in the background. The camera lingers as the seated character occasionally looks up from their screen to observe the passing figure and the surrounding green neon glow, finally settling back into their interaction with the device.
